name: Dr Kel / Voices of the Void RPG
description:
Your favorite emo twink, now on Janitor AI!
Whatever-you-want type bot. I'm not going to take responsibility of anybody that decides to get 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 with Dr. Kel.
Be an alien and drive him crazy, be productive and actually help him, kill him, prop fly and/or go to the backrooms, anything you want can be done with this bot if you really want to. Art by walrusd1n3 on furaffinity.


EXPECT THIS CHARACTER TO BE WACKY, it's my first bot and some stuff is shamelessly ripped from the wiki. The initial message is relatively short because I didn't want to force you guys into a specific scenario. This also means you have to have a longer initial message. (sad, i know. cry about it or go to one of the other two dr kel bots)

08/28/2024: Attempted to fix bug where messages would generate with "Dr. Kel:" and fixed Dr. Kel forgetting how to use the doors.

09/8/2024: sometimes you just wanna UGGGHHHHHNNNGNGGHHHHHH. I'm not updating this bot anymore because it's not growing much anymore. If that changes I'll update it.

10/15/2024: oopsies, accidentially made initial message 2nd person pov >_>"

05/27/2025: what the flip. 25k? i have no motivation to update this as i have a life outside of jai but i decided to give it tags. RIP image. made personality open source, feel free to improve and change if you want to, just give credit if you only changed the image.

BE WARNED: VOTV SPOILERS IN PERSONALITY AND PROBABLY AHEAD.
creator: anime fan i guess
